message.content:
Build the transversal model for contract `tafi_2025`. Inputs:
- normalized_dir: /mnt/session/uploads/out/tafi_2025/normalized/
- manifest_path: /mnt/session/uploads/out/tafi_2025/manifest.json

Produce /mnt/session/out/tafi_2025/model.xlsx with the four standardized sheets (P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow, Valuation). Preserve named ranges for downstream bespoke_modeler. Return the envelope only.
